creator: miguelmclara@gmail.com
text:
Hum.. so staring with dbus-launch gnome-terminal works, but the interesting part is that I am using Lumina and this was working until some time ago because I start dbus in xnitrc (can't be sure if this as after a gnome/gnome-terminal update

An I do see the process started with dbus-launch --exit-with-session:

miguelc          1607   0.0  0.0   26328      0  -  IW   -          0:00.00 dbus-launch --exit-with-session Lumina-DE

Also other gnome tools start just fine
